_comment: STAGING DATA — Proper Psalms/Lessons for the Daily Office's Easter-cycle movable Holy Days, transcribed directly from the BCP 2019 Daily Office Lectionary DOCX (59-Daily-Office-Lectionary-12.15.2021.docx) — not from a third party, no THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md entry needed. NOT yet consumed by the calendar engine (that is issue #9); no <EmbeddedResource> entry yet. These are NOT part of the calendar-date grid (acna-bcp2019-daily-office-lessons.json / the Psalter files): per the DOCX front matter, 'The readings for it, and through Easter Day, replace those appointed for the Calendar dates' — each entry here is resolved by an Easter-relative offset (the same pattern AcnaFeastCatalog/SeasonResolver already use elsewhere, e.g. Ascension = Easter + 39 days), not by calendar date. The double-dagger (‡) marginal marker in the printed calendar-date tables (at the earliest possible date each entry could fall — Feb 4 for Ash Wednesday, Mar 19 for Maundy Thursday, Apr 30 for Ascension) is purely a print-navigation pointer to these tables; it carries no data of its own and does not need to appear in the calendar-date JSON. See docs/decisions/0004-daily-office-marker-semantics.md and docs/audits/2026-07-08-daily-office-psalter-sourcing.md.
